query:
SELECT cj.id, cj.status, cj.sessionId, cs.stage, cs.leadSource 
FROM completed_jobs cj 
JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.id = cj.sessionId 
WHERE cs.leadSource IN ('review', 'review-test') 
ORDER BY cj.id DESC LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT cj.id, cj.status, cj.sessionId, cs.stage, cs.leadSource 
FROM completed_jobs cj 
JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.id = cj.sessionId 
WHERE cs.leadSource IN ('review', 'review-test') 
ORDER BY cj.id DESC LIMIT 20;
